pr_text:
## Title: Add null check for PUSCH config before computing precoding information

### Summary
The `config_uldci()` function in the NR MAC gNB scheduler was calling `compute_precoding_information()` without validating that the `pusch_Config` pointer is non-NULL. This could lead to null pointer dereference and crashes when PUSCH configuration is not available during DCI preparation. This patch adds a defensive null check to ensure precoding information is only computed when the configuration is va
